creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Lorenzo Salvadore from comment #0)

Thank you for patch.

I read bug #233696, and then read the note of section 3.1.
My understandings are.

1. 'Created by:' header is obsolete.
2. While removing this header is not required, it is not forbidden either.

So I would like keep Makefile as is.
